title: The Last Crystal Cup
description: Fight a crystal cup cuz yes.
body:
THIS MOD WAS DONE IN AROUND 15 HOURS FOR AN APRIL FOOLS MCREATOR MODJAM

## Hello there, want to kill a cup that for some reason can summon an air strike?

Look no more lol!

TLCC is a mod that adds a single boss fight, 
The Last Crystal Cup

he can easily be summoned with: The First Crystal Cup, a craftable item
(like crafting an empty bottle but sorrounded by obsidian)

he has absolutely no rewards! (maybe later)
Of course ignoring the Experience of the fight! (both real and figuratively)

This boss has 4 cups sorrounding him, damaging him will redirect the majority of the damage into the cups, and as you kill the cups he will grow stronger with new attacks, each other more dangeours than the previous

# *List of attacks*
## (FROM CUP 4 TO 0)

LAUNCHER: shots crystals at you, hurts,
IMPACT: chases you to destroy your skull
MINES: places randomly crystals around you, may stung
TELEPORT: need a description?
*HOLY SUPREME CRYSTAL RAIN FALL AIR STRIKE:* obliterates you going KBOOM

good luck with your figth! (diamond gear recommended at hard difficulty)
